languages.text: "Знаете... пришлось спасать свою шкуру. Судьба остальных мне неизвестна".

traits.locale_text: "Знаете... пришлось спасать свою шкуру. Судьба остальных мне неизвестна".

languages.text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."
languages.original_text: "Знаете... пришлось спасать свою шкуру. Судьба остальных мне неизвестна".

traits.locale_text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."
"You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."
"You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."

languages.text: “是这样的……我得先自保。至于其他人怎么样了，我并不清楚。”
languages.original_text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."

traits.locale_text: “是这样的……我得先自保。至于其他人怎么样了，我并不清楚。”

languages.text: « Je regrette, mais j'étais trop {mf|occupé|occupée} à sauver ma peau pour me soucier des autres. »
languages.original_text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."

traits.locale_text: « Je regrette, mais j'étais trop {mf|occupé|occupée} à sauver ma peau pour me soucier des autres. »

languages.text: "Takdir edersin ki... Bir şekilde kurtulmak zorundaydım. Diğerlerinin akıbetini bilmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."

traits.locale_text: "Takdir edersin ki... Bir şekilde kurtulmak zorundaydım. Diğerlerinin akıbetini bilmiyorum."

languages.text: «Verá... Tenía que sobrevivir. Desconozco el destino de los demás».
languages.original_text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."

traits.locale_text: «Verá... Tenía que sobrevivir. Desconozco el destino de los demás».

languages.text: "Wisst Ihr ... Ich musste mich selbst retten. Ich weiß nicht, was aus den anderen wurde."
languages.original_text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."

traits.locale_text: "Wisst Ihr ... Ich musste mich selbst retten. Ich weiß nicht, was aus den anderen wurde."

languages.text: 「見てください…私は自分を救わなければなりませんでした。他の人たちの運命はわかりません。」
languages.original_text: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."

traits.locale_text: 「見てください…私は自分を救わなければなりませんでした。他の人たちの運命はわかりません。」
